jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at CMC Vellore
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!
